titleStmt.title: SII 8.753: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 753. (A.R. No. 437 of 1903). ON THE WEST AND NORTH WALLS OF THE SAME SHRINE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tribhu vaṉacakra vatti śrī koṉerimelkoṇṭāṉ rājarā
javaḷanāṭṭup paṉaiyūrnāṭṭup peṟaiyūrnāṭṭut taṉiyūr paravaipurattut tiruppuṟavār panaṅkāṭṭur Uṭaiyār
kaṇṇamantanāyaṉār koyil tāṉattārkku . yiṉṉāyaṉārkku namperāṟ kaṭṭiṉa kotaṇṭarāmaṉ cantikkum tirunāḷukkum
Amutupaṭikkum cāttuppaṭikkum Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nitta nimantaṅkaḷukkum tiruppaṇikkum Uṭalāka taṅkaḷū
r paḻantevatāṉam paravaipuram nāṟpāṟkellai kuṭpaṭṭa naṉcey puṉcey Uḷḷiṭṭa samastaprāpti kaḷum Iṉṉāṭṭup paḻan
yāṇṭu patiṉmuṉṟāvatu nilam nel mutalaṭaṅka teva
tāṉa Iṟaiyiliyākat tirntu Innilaṅkaḷum Aṭai ka karumpu ceṅkaḻuṉir teṅku kamuku palā vāḻai koḻuntu mañcaḷ Iñci Uḷḷiṭṭa
pala payirkaḷum Eḷḷu vaḻutilai pākal Uḷḷiṭṭa puṉpayirum ceytukoḷvatākavum . Innilattāl varum neṟkaṭamai kācu kaṭamai kamuku kaṭamai
payirkkaṭamai puṉceykkaṭamai Erimiṉ pāṭṭam ceṭṭiṟai cekkiṟai taṭṭōli taṭṭārppāṭam Āṉaiccālai kutirai
ppanti Olaieḻuttu viṉiyokam Ilāñcaṉaippeṟu cantuvikra mappeṟu nāṭṭuviṉiyokam Āḷ Amañci Erper�
tar kaikkāṇi tulāpāravari kūṟṟilakkai kaṭaikkūṭṭilakkai ciṟaiviṉiyokam vācaloṭṭu kāttikaippaccai �ta
ti kap poṉvari kūṟṟuvari mukampārvai veṭṭi nilaiyāḷ paṇikkottup pāṭikāval maravaṭai māvaṭai kuḷavaṭai pāci
ppāṭṭam Aḻukalcarakku Aṅkāṭippāṭṭam Ulāvipparimāṟuvarvari Āyam makamai maṟṟum Uḷḷa
samasta prāpti kaḷum mutalaṭaṅka Iṟaiyiliyākat tantom . Ippaṭikku cantirātittavarai
celvatāka kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoṇṭu mutalaṭaṅka Iṟaiyiliyāka Aṉupavit
tu cantiyum tirunāḷum tiruppaṇiyum tāḻvaṟa naṭattippotuka . Ivai neṭṭuruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu .
yāṇṭu 10 3 ḷu-vatukku Etirāvatu nāḷ 100 4 10 4 Ivai kāliṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu tulyam .
Digital edition of SII 8.753 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
